hooks.command: node -e "const a=process.env.TOOL_INPUT||'{}';try{const i=JSON.parse(a);if(i.command&&/git\s+push/.test(i.command)){process.stdout.write('\n[提醒] 即将执行 git push，请确认已审查所有变更。\n');}}catch(e){}"

PreToolUse.description: git push 前提醒审查变更

hooks.command: node -e "const a=process.env.TOOL_INPUT||'{}';try{const i=JSON.parse(a);const p=i.file_path||'';if(/\.(md|txt)$/i.test(p)&&!/README|CLAUDE|AGENTS|CONTRIBUTING|CHANGELOG/i.test(p)&&!p.includes('.claude/plans/')&&!p.includes('.claude/rules/')&&!p.includes('.claude/commands/')&&!p.includes('.claude/skills/')&&!p.includes('.claude/contexts/')&&!p.includes('.claude/agents/')){process.stderr.write('阻止创建多余的文档文件: '+p+'\n请仅在必要时创建文档。');process.exit(2);}}catch(e){}"

PreToolUse.description: 阻止创建多余的 .md/.txt 文件

hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | node -e "try{const i=JSON.parse(require(\"fs\").readFileSync(\"/dev/stdin\",\"utf8\"));console.log(i.file_path||\"\")}catch(e){}"); if [[ "$FILE" == *.py ]] && command -v ruff &>/dev/null; then ruff format --quiet "$FILE" 2>/dev/null && ruff check --fix --quiet "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; fi'

PostToolUse.description: 编辑 Python 文件后自动 ruff format + check

hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | node -e "try{const i=JSON.parse(require(\"fs\").readFileSync(\"/dev/stdin\",\"utf8\"));console.log(i.file_path||\"\")}catch(e){}"); if [[ "$FILE" == *.ts || "$FILE" == *.tsx ]] && command -v bun &>/dev/null; then cd "$(dirname "$FILE")" && bun tsc --noEmit --pretty 2>&1 | head -20; fi'

PostToolUse.description: 编辑 TypeScript 文件后异步类型检查

hooks.command: bash -c 'if command -v git &>/dev/null && git rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree &>/dev/null 2>&1; then DIFF=$(git diff --cached --diff-filter=ACM --name-only 2>/dev/null; git diff --diff-filter=ACM --name-only 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$DIFF" ]; then for f in $DIFF; do if [[ "$f" == *.py ]]; then grep -n "\bprint(" "$f" 2>/dev/null | grep -v "#.*noqa" | head -3 | while read line; do echo "[警告] $f:$line — print() 调试语句"; done; elif [[ "$f" == *.ts || "$f" == *.tsx || "$f" == *.js || "$f" == *.jsx ]]; then grep -n "console\.log" "$f" 2>/dev/null | head -3 | while read line; do echo "[警告] $f:$line — console.log 调试语句"; done; fi; done; fi; fi'

Stop.description: 检查已修改文件中的调试语句残留
